utf16TemplateLiteralInference.ts(4,7): error TS2322: Type '["\uD83D", "\uDE00abc"]' is not assignable to type '["😀", "abc"]'.
  Type at position 0 in source is not compatible with type at position 0 in target.
    Type '"\uD83D"' is not assignable to type '"😀"'.


==== utf16TemplateLiteralInference.ts (1 errors) ====
    type Heads<S> = S extends `${infer C}${infer R}` ? [C, R] : never;
    type A = Heads<"😀abc">;
    declare let a: A;
    const chk: ["😀", "abc"] = a;
          ~~~
!!! error TS2322: Type '["\uD83D", "\uDE00abc"]' is not assignable to type '["😀", "abc"]'.
!!! error TS2322:   Type at position 0 in source is not compatible with type at position 0 in target.
!!! error TS2322:     Type '"\uD83D"' is not assignable to type '"😀"'.
